mapper.select: select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price,to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_hope, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2) on (auc_no = con_no) where TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price,to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_hope, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2) on (auc_no = con_no) where auc_no = #{aucNo}

select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price,to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_hope, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2) on (auc_no = con_no)
where TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where TO_TIMESTAMP(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and con_product = '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_author = '%' || #{content} || '%'
and TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{aucSS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{aucSE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{aucFS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TO_TIMESTAMP(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{aucFE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
